questions.question: I ___ games yesterday. (play)
questions.explanation: 過去形には -ed をつけます

questions.question: I ___ English last night. (study)
questions.explanation: 子音+yで終わる語は、yをiに変えて -ed をつけます

questions.question: I ___ TV this morning. (watch)
questions.explanation: 過去形には -ed をつけます

questions.question: I ___ music yesterday. (like)
questions.explanation: eで終わる語には -d をつけます

questions.question: I ___ to school yesterday. (walk)
questions.explanation: 過去形には -ed をつけます

questions.question: She ___ tennis last week. (play)
questions.explanation: 過去形には主語に関わらず -ed をつけます

questions.question: They ___ the movie yesterday. (watch)
questions.explanation: 過去形には -ed をつけます

questions.question: He ___ hard last month. (study)
questions.explanation: 子音+yで終わる語は、yをiに変えて -ed をつけます

questions.question: I ___ my room last weekend. (clean)
questions.explanation: 規則動詞の過去形は動詞 + ed です

questions.question: She ___ her friend yesterday. (call)
questions.explanation: 規則動詞の過去形は動詞 + ed です

questions.question: They ___ the game last night. (finish)
questions.explanation: 規則動詞の過去形は動詞 + ed です

questions.question: He ___ the car last Sunday. (wash)
questions.explanation: 規則動詞の過去形は動詞 + ed です
